name: maidlink
description: Maid booking platform MVP — monorepo root

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && concurrently -n db,auth,users,booking,admin,web -c bgBlue,cyan,green,yellow,magenta,white "npm run db:up" "npm run offline --workspace=services/auth" "npm run offline --workspace=services/users" "npm run offline --workspace=services/booking" "npm run offline --workspace=services/admin" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:down && npm run db:up && sleep 3 && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
